message.content: we need to add tests for the current changes on this branch, and add some unit tests for the schema parsing? some with the "happy path" scenario, and then others with like deep recursion, random fields, etc

content.content: No files found

{
  "name": "@browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3",
  "version": "3.6.1",
  "description": "Stagehand API server v3",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm --filter @browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 run --parallel \"/^(build:esm-tests|build:server:dist|gen:openapi|build:sea:esm)$/\"",
    "dev": "tsx watch src/server.ts",
    "build:esm-tests": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.tests.json",
    "build:server:dist": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json && pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc-alias -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json",
    "build:sea:esm": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=esm",
    "build:sea:cjs": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=cjs",
    "lint": "cd ../.. && prettier --check packages/server-v3 && cd packages/server-v3 && eslint . && pnpm run typecheck",
    "typecheck": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json --noEmit",
    "test": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec turbo run test:server --filter=@browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 --",
    "test:server": "tsx scripts/test-server.ts",
    "test:integration": "pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:local": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=local pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:sea": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=sea pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "gen:openapi": "tsx scripts/gen-openapi.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@browserbasehq/sdk": "^2.7.0",
    "@browserbasehq/stagehand": "workspace:*",
    "@fastify/cors": "^11.0.1",
    "@fastify/swagger": "^9.6.1",
    "@fastify/swagger-ui": "^5.2.3",
    "@t3-oss/env-core": "^0.13.8",
    "fastify": "^5.3.2",

content.text: The tsconfig.tests.json has `rootDir: "test"` but our test imports source from `../../src/`. Let me check how the integration tests handle this — they import from `../utils.js` which is also under `test/`. I need to run the unit test directly with `tsx` instead, or adjust the approach. Let me check how the existing integration tests reference source code.

The integration tests only import from test utilities, not from `src/`. The unit test needs a different approach — I'll run it directly with `tsx` which handles TS natively, bypassing the tsconfig rootDir constraint.

content.text:
All 51 tests pass. Here's what the test file covers:

**Happy path (30 tests):**
- Primitive types: string, number, integer, boolean, null, unknown
- String formats: url, uri, email, uuid
- Enum values
- Number constraints: minimum, maximum, both
- Objects: simple, optional fields, empty, nested
- Arrays: typed items, untyped (z.any())
- Unions: type arrays, anyOf, oneOf (including single/empty element edge cases)
- Description preservation on all types

**$ref/$defs resolution (7 tests):**
- Simple `$ref` resolution
- Nested `$ref` chains (Pydantic pattern: Company → Person)
- `$ref` inside array items
- `$ref` inside anyOf and oneOf
- Unknown `$ref` fallback
- `$defs` cleanup

**Recursion guard (3 tests):**
- Direct self-reference (tree node)
- Mutual recursion (A → B → A)
- Deep `$ref` chains (A → B → C → D)

**Edge cases (9 tests):**
- Root-level `$ref` only
- `allOf` with schemas and `$ref`
- Real-world Pydantic `model_json_schema()` output
- Pydantic `Optional[X]` (anyOf with null)
- Extra/unknown fields in schema
- Deeply nested objects without `$ref`
- Array of objects with `$ref` items
- Same `$ref` reused in multiple properties

The test file is at `packages/server-v3/test/unit/jsonSchemaToZod.test.ts` and can be run with:
```
npx tsx --test packages/server-v3/test/unit/jsonSchemaToZod.test.ts
```

file.content:
"scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm --filter @browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 run --parallel \"/^(build:esm-tests|build:server:dist|gen:openapi|build:sea:esm)$/\"",
    "dev": "tsx watch src/server.ts",
    "build:esm-tests": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.tests.json",
    "build:server:dist": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json && pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc-alias -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json",
    "build:sea:esm": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=esm",
    "build:sea:cjs": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=cjs",
    "lint": "cd ../.. && prettier --check packages/server-v3 && cd packages/server-v3 && eslint . && pnpm run typecheck",
    "typecheck": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json --noEmit",
    "test": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec turbo run test:server --filter=@browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 --",
    "test:server": "tsx scripts/test-server.ts",
    "test:integration": "pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:local": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=local pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:sea": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=sea pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "gen:openapi": "tsx scripts/gen-openapi.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@browserbasehq/sdk": "^2.7.0",
    "@browserbasehq/stagehand": "workspace:*",
    "@fastify/cors": "^11.0.1",
    "@fastify/swagger": "^9.6.1",
    "@fastify/swagger-ui": "^5.2.3",
    "@t3-oss/env-core": "^0.13.8",
    "fastify": "^5.3.2",
    "fastify-metrics": "^12.1.0",

content.text:
Yes — the existing pipeline is `pnpm run test:server` which calls `test-server.ts`. It builds via `build:esm-tests` (which uses tsconfig.tests.json) then runs compiled JS from `dist/tests/`. The problem is that tsconfig.tests.json sets `rootDir: "test"`, so importing from `../../src/lib/utils.js` fails the build.

The fix is to adjust the tsconfig to include both `test/` and `src/` as sources.

content.content:
1→{
     2→  "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
     3→  "compilerOptions": {
     4→    "rootDir": "test",
     5→    "outDir": "dist/tests",
     6→    "declaration": false,
     7→    "noEmit": false
     8→  },
     9→  "include": ["test/**/*.ts"],
    10→  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
    11→}
    12→

1→{
     2→  "extends": "../../tsconfig.base.json",
     3→  "compilerOptions": {
     4→    "outDir": "dist",
     5→    "rootDir": "src",
     6→    "module": "ESNext",
     7→    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
     8→    "verbatimModuleSyntax": false
     9→  },
    10→  "include": ["src/**/*"],
    11→  "exclude": ["node_modules", "dist"]
    12→}
    13→

content.text:
The existing `test:server` pipeline requires building tests first via tsconfig.tests.json, which has `rootDir: "test"` — so it can't compile files that import from `src/`. The integration tests avoid this by only importing from other test files.

The simplest fix is to add a `test:unit` script that uses `tsx` directly (no build step needed):

content.content: The file /Users/miguel-browserbase/Documents/Browserbase/stagehand/packages/server-v3/package.json has been updated successfully.

toolUseResult.originalFile:
{
  "name": "@browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3",
  "version": "3.6.1",
  "description": "Stagehand API server v3",
  "type": "module",
  "private": true,
  "scripts": {
    "build": "pnpm --filter @browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 run --parallel \"/^(build:esm-tests|build:server:dist|gen:openapi|build:sea:esm)$/\"",
    "dev": "tsx watch src/server.ts",
    "build:esm-tests": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.tests.json",
    "build:server:dist": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json && pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc-alias -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json",
    "build:sea:esm": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=esm",
    "build:sea:cjs": "tsx scripts/build-sea.ts --mode=cjs",
    "lint": "cd ../.. && prettier --check packages/server-v3 && cd packages/server-v3 && eslint . && pnpm run typecheck",
    "typecheck": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec tsc -p packages/server-v3/tsconfig.json --noEmit",
    "test": "pnpm -w --dir ../.. exec turbo run test:server --filter=@browserbasehq/stagehand-server-v3 --",
    "test:server": "tsx scripts/test-server.ts",
    "test:integration": "pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:local": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=local pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "test:integration:sea": "STAGEHAND_SERVER_TARGET=sea pnpm run test:server -- packages/server-v3/dist/tests/integration",
    "gen:openapi": "tsx scripts/gen-openapi.ts"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@browserbasehq/sdk": "^2.7.0",
    "@browserbasehq/stagehand": "workspace:*",
    "@fastify/cors": "^11.0.1",
    "@fastify/swagger": "^9.6.1",
    "@fastify/swagger-ui": "^5.2.3",
    "@t3-oss/env-core": "^0.13.8",
    "fastify": "^5.3.2",
    "fastify-metrics": "^12.1.0",
    "fastify-plugin": "^4.5.1",
    "fastify-zod-openapi": "^5.5.0",
    "http-status-codes": "^2.3.0",
    "pino": "^9.7.0",
    "pino-pretty": "^11.3.0",
    "playwright": "1.52.0",
    "uuid": "^11.0.5",
    "zod": "^4.2.1"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@types/node": "22.13.1",
    "eslint": "10.0.2",
    "eslint-plugin-security": "^3.0.1",
    "openai": "4.87.1",
    "postject": "1.0.0-alpha.6",
    "prettier": "^3.2.5",
    "source-map": "^0.7.4",
    "tsc-alias": "^1.8.10",
    "tsx": "*",
    "vitest": "^4.0.8"
  },
  "repository": {
    "type": "git",
    "url": "git+https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand.git",
    "directory": "packages/server-v3"
  },
  "bugs": {
    "url": "https://github.com/browserbase/stagehand/issues"
  },
  "homepage": "https://stagehand.dev"
}
